description: Translates project coding standards into concrete linting and formatting tool configurations for the Stars project (JS/TS/Vue)

queries.prompt: We need to enforce that all Vue components use PascalCase in templates
Configure ESLint to require type imports for TypeScript
Set up Prettier to match our coding conventions from AGENTS.md
I want a lint check that catches unused variables in our TS codebase
Add a pre-commit hook that formats our Vue and TS files
Can we enforce kebab-case for file names with a tool?
How do I make sure nobody commits console.log statements?
Set up CI to run linting and type checking
I need to configure tsconfig.json for strict mode
We're migrating JS to TS, what linting should we add?
What does the Vue 3 style guide say about component naming?
Can we auto-fix import ordering in our Vue SFCs?
Should we use Biome instead of ESLint + Prettier?
Help me deploy the galaxy visualization to GitHub Pages
How does the Three.js galaxy rendering pipeline work?
What branch naming convention should I use?
Set up GitHub Actions to deploy the app
